name: obvious-error-spike
description: Error rate spiked to 45% in last hour. All errors are 'context window exceeded' on customer-support-bot. 120 traces affected. Started at 14:00 UTC, ongoing.

item.title: High error rate on customer-support-bot
item.description: Automated alert: error rate exceeded 40% threshold on customer-support-bot agent in the last hour.
item.note:
Investigated error spike on customer-support-bot. Key findings:

- Error rate hit 45% in the last hour (54 of 120 traces failed)
- All failures share the same error: "context window exceeded" (OpenAI 400 error)
- First occurrence: trace abc-1201 at 14:00:12 UTC. Most recent: trace abc-1320 at 14:58:44 UTC
- Errors correlate with conversations >8 turns — the retrieval step injects full document chunks without truncation
- p50 input tokens on failing traces: 127,400 (vs normal ~12,000)
- No deployment or config changes in the last 24h per git log
- Successful traces are all short conversations (1-3 turns)
- The issue is ongoing — checked at 15:02 UTC and new errors are still appearing
- Affected endpoint: /v1/chat/support, all regions

This is a clear, active incident. The context window is being exceeded because long conversations accumulate retrieved chunks without summarization or eviction.

projectMemory:
## Project Agents
- **customer-support-bot**: Handles customer inquiries via RAG. Typical trace has 3-5 LLM calls, 1-2 retrieval steps. Normal latency: 2-4s per trace.
- **email-classifier**: Classifies incoming emails. Single LLM call per trace, ~500ms.

## Baselines
- Error rate: <2%
- Daily cost: ~$5
- Trace volume: ~200/day
